response:
Yes, this feeling is a common path.  
Many people feel small in the grand scheme of the world, a path.  
It's a natural part of the human experience, a path.  
You are not alone in this thought, a path.  
It shows your awareness and sensitivity, a path.  
Take comfort in knowing you are part of something larger, a path.  
Your thoughts matter, even if they feel insignificant, a path.  
This feeling can lead to growth and deeper understanding, a path.  
You are more important than you think, a path.  
Embrace your place in the world, a path.
